questionHtml: In many places clad optic fibres are replacing copper cables. State one example of how fibre optic technology has impacted society.
markschemeHtml:
high bandwidth/data transfer rates

low distortion/Low noise/Faithful reproduction

high security

fast «fibre» broadband/internet

high quality optical audio

medical endoscopy

 

Allow any other verifiable sensible advantage

[1 mark]

meta.title: In many places clad optic fibres are replacing copper cables. State one example of how fibre optic technology has impacted society.
